testcase.name: BuyOrder Form — Django Supplies App › Scenario 1: Create BuyOrder with all required fields
BuyOrder Form — Django Supplies App › Scenario 2: Check multiple العرض boxes and verify they save
testcase.system-out:
Scenario 2 — Offer badges found: [ [32m'عرض Envap'[39m, [32m'عرض أول'[39m, [32m'عرض ثالث'[39m ]

testcase.name: BuyOrder Form — Django Supplies App › Scenario 3: Check multiple محضر باللجان boxes and verify they save
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: BuyOrder Form — Django Supplies App › Scenario 4: Upload memo and attachment files, verify download links appear
testcase.system-out:
Scenario 4 — Has memo download link: [33mtrue[39m Scenario 4 — Has attachment download link: [33mtrue[39m

testcase.name: BuyOrder Form — Django Supplies App › Scenario 5: Full journey — all fields, checkboxes, attachments, verify detail page
testcase.system-out:
Scenario 5 — Offer badges: [ [32m'عرض Envap'[39m, [32m'عرض أول'[39m, [32m'عرض ثالث'[39m ] Scenario 5 — Committee badges: [ [32m'لجنة فنية'[39m, [32m'ش. مالية'[39m, [32m'توقيع المشرف'[39m ]

testcase.name: ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 1: Sidebar contains عملية تعاقد link navigating to /add/
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 2: Create توريدات operation and verify redirect to channel detail
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 3: Live calculator shows remaining = total - paid
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 4: Create صيانة operation, verify it appears in channel detail table
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 5: Create مقاولات operation, verify it appears in channel detail table
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 6: Channel detail table shows grouped operations with correct remaining amounts
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 7: Edit operation name and verify change persists
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 8: Delete operation and verify removal from table
ContractOperation Feature — Django Supplies App › Scenario 9: Create operation with attachment, verify download link in table
